firs.description: 6 people came and snatch my Rs 1200000
I was going and cyber crime was committed during my ride and 2 lacs siphoning
firs.application_text:
To,
        The SHO,
        city
        
        Subject: Application for filing First Information Report (FIR)
        
        Sir/Madam,
        
        I, Ashish pandey,
        resident of 347/312 old tikait ganj,
        Mobile: 7992103007,
        
        hereby state that on 26/09/2025 at 
        Lucknow nigoha, the following incident occurred:
        
        I was going and cyber crime was committed during my ride and 2 lacs siphoning
        
        Incident Type: cyber
        
        Accused Persons: Virendra
        
        Witnesses: Skip
        
        Evidence: Yes all pen drive
        
        Therefore, I request you to register an FIR and take necessary legal action.
        
        Date: 27/06/2026
        
        Yours sincerely,
        
        (Ashish pandey)
        Signature
        
        ------------------------------------------------------------
        
        AFFIDAVIT
        
        I, Ashish pandey, 
        do hereby solemnly affirm and declare that the above information 
        is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.
        
        Date: 27/06/2026
        
        (Ashish pandey)
